GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
Backwards-compatible entry point that preserves the legacy GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX type while delegating to the modern JournalEntryWorkspaceFX implementation.
GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX
Convenience constructor mirroring the historical no-arg variant.
GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX(Consumer<AccountingTransaction>) - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX
Creates a new panel that invokes onSave when a transaction is persisted.
GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX(AccountingTransaction, Consumer<AccountingTransaction>) - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX
Creates a panel that pre-populates the UI using an existing transaction and notifies onSave when edits are committed.

getPrimaryRawCategory() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.LedgerSplit
